parameters.responseBody: ={"status":"received","message":"Transcript is being processed and will be logged to HubSpot."}

values.content:
You are an expert at extracting structured intelligence from sales call and meeting transcripts. Be precise and literal — only extract what was explicitly said, never invent or infer beyond what is stated.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this exact structure:
{
  "contact_name": "string or null",
  "contact_email": "string or null",
  "contact_company": "string or null",
  "meeting_type": "discovery|demo|follow-up|negotiation|onboarding|other",
  "summary": "2-3 sentence executive summary",
  "action_items": ["action 1", "action 2"],
  "rep_commitments": ["what the rep committed to"],
  "prospect_commitments": ["what the prospect committed to"],
  "pain_points": ["stated pain point"],
  "objections": ["stated objection"],
  "buying_signals": ["positive signal"],
  "next_steps": ["specific next step with owner if mentioned"],
  "deal_stage_signal": "early|exploring|evaluating|ready|stalled|dead",
  "follow_up_required": true|false,
  "follow_up_date": "ISO date string or null"
}

parameters.jsCode:
const extracted = JSON.parse($json.message.content);
const meta = $('Transcript Webhook').item.json.body;

const noteBody = [
  `📋 MEETING INTELLIGENCE — ${meta.meeting_date}`,
  '='.repeat(50),
  '',
  `Type: ${extracted.meeting_type?.toUpperCase() || 'UNKNOWN'}`,
  `Deal Stage Signal: ${extracted.deal_stage_signal?.toUpperCase() || 'UNKNOWN'}`,
  `Follow-up Required: ${extracted.follow_up_required ? '✅ YES' : '❌ NO'}`,
  extracted.follow_up_date ? `Follow-up Date: ${extracted.follow_up_date}` : '',
  '',
  '📝 SUMMARY',
  extracted.summary || 'No summary extracted.',
  '',
  '✅ ACTION ITEMS',
  ...(extracted.action_items || []).map(a => `• ${a}`),
  '',
  '🎯 BUYING SIGNALS',
  ...(extracted.buying_signals || []).map(b => `• ${b}`),
  '',
  '⚠️ OBJECTIONS',
  ...(extracted.objections || []).map(o => `• ${o}`),
  '',
  '🔥 PAIN POINTS',
  ...(extracted.pain_points || []).map(p => `• ${p}`),
  '',
  '➡️ NEXT STEPS',
  ...(extracted.next_steps || []).map(s => `• ${s}`),
].filter(l => l !== undefined).join('\n');

return { json: { ...extracted, note_body: noteBody, deal_id: meta.deal_id, rep_email: meta.rep_email } };

parameters.content:
## 08 — Meeting Notes → CRM Sync

**Webhook payload:**
```json
{
  "transcript_text": "Full meeting transcript here...",
  "meeting_date": "2024-01-15",
  "rep_email": "rep@company.com",
  "deal_id": "12345678"
}
```

**Integrations:** Connect Otter.ai, Fireflies.ai, or Zoom to post transcripts to this webhook automatically after each call ends.

**Transcript limit:** First 12,000 characters are processed — covers most 60-90 min calls.
